---
title: "Webinars"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Online learning sessions by industry experts"
description: "Join free webinars on cybersecurity, cloud computing, AI, software development, and digital transformation led by industry experts."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Webinars</h1>
    <p>Free, expert-led sessions on cybersecurity, cloud, AI, and digital transformation. Join from anywhere.</p>
    <a href="#upcoming" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">See upcoming</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING WEBINARS -->
<div class="m-s" id="upcoming" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming webinars</h2>
    <p class="sub">Live sessions with Q&A. Register to save your spot.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/zero-trust-security.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Zero Trust"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">90 min</div><h3>Zero Trust Security</h3><p>Principles, implementation strategies, and real-world case studies.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/cloud-cost-optimization.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud Cost"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">60 min</div><h3>Cloud Cost Optimization</h3><p>Identify waste, implement governance, and maximize cloud ROI.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/ai-ethics-developers.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">120 min</div><h3>AI Ethics for Developers</h3><p>Responsible AI, privacy, fairness, and transparency in practice.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/cyber-awareness.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Cyber Awareness"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">90 min</div><h3>Cyber Awareness</h3><p>New-school security awareness training with KnowBe4.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/digital-transformation.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Digital Transformation"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">75 min</div><h3>Digital Transformation</h3><p>Framework for leading technology change in your organization.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING SERIES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Recurring series</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular sessions you can count on.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Security First</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Monthly deep dives into cybersecurity practices, threat intelligence, and security architecture. First Tuesday, 60 min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monthly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Cloud Mastery</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Cloud technologies, architecture patterns, and operational best practices across major platforms. Monthly, 90 min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monthly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-heart-pulse" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Cyber Hygiene</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Weekly sessions covering procedures, frameworks, and cybersecurity methodologies. Every Wednesday, 60 min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Weekly</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST WEBINARS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past webinars</h2>
    <p class="sub">Recordings available for registered participants.</p>
    <div class="row g-4" style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Cyber Awareness">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-collection-play me-1"></i> Recording available</div>
            <h3>Cyber Awareness Best Practices</h3>
            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">With Chenist, KnowBe4, and the Romanian Cybersecurity Office (DNSC).</p>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> March 2025</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Data Privacy">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-collection-play me-1"></i> Recording available</div>
            <h3>Data Privacy Compliance</h3>
            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">Global data privacy regulations and practical compliance approaches.</p>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> February 2025</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Never miss a webinar</h2>
    <p>Subscribe for announcements, tech insights, and exclusive content.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-bell me-2"></i>Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
